findings.summary: Step 3 of directive: per-session FUSE-independence hypothesis CONFIRMED via 3 natural experiments documented in past 24h (tinker-2026-05-31T08-54, 09-25-prop-068-impl, 09-48-fuse-staleness-cleanup). No cross-session freshness mechanism exists in the cowork backend that the dome project can rely on.

analyst.md Step 0a explicitly says "Do NOT cd into the clone" (line 82), but the Mode 2b OBE note at line 258 says "those are decider-canonical / clone-fresh files, so use the relative-path (clone) reads". These contradict directly. Operator should resolve as part of PROP-071 fix-pattern A vs B choice.
